posts.author: jade.woodward (Jade)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add a ‘filter by all connected workbooks’ to either the individual widget filters, or the overall Dashboard page widget?

image1407×360 27.8 KB

I’ve got multiple boards connected to one dashboard, but I want them all to have the same filters…currently I have to select each board individually and find the right filters for each.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jade!

At this time, the filtering has to be set one-by-one but if you duplicate the widget and change the board it is connected to, perhaps that will help you maintain the settings you’ve established so it’s a little less work each time!

I hope this is helpful! Let me know how this goes!
